zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Noell於1151年出生時，他的父親Robert Noell24歲，母親Lady Alice de Montfort25歲。他於1177年之前與Margaret Strange在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1206年享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Noell于1151年出生时，他的父亲Robert Noell24岁，母亲Lady Alice de Montfort25岁。他于1177年之前与Margaret Strange在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1206年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Noell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Nöll): habitational name from any of several places in Rhineland and Westphalia named Nöll. Compare Noll 3.

variants.name: Noll
meanings: German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names composed of the first element ending with -n + wald ‘rule’, for example Arnold and Reinwald .
South German: nickname for a rotund or naive person, from Middle High German nol ‘hillock, knoll’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Noell was born in 1151, his father, Robert Noell, was 24 and his mother, Lady Alice de Montfort, was 25. He married Margaret Strange before 1177, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died about 1206, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Noell est né en 1151, son père, Robert Noell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Montfort, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Strange avant 1177, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1206, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Noell 1151 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Noell 24 und seine Mutter Lady Alice de Montfort 25. Er hat vor 1177 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1206 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Noell è nato il nel 1151, il suo padre, Robert Noell, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice de Montfort, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Strange prima del 1177, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì circa 1206, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Noellが1151年に生まれた時，父Robert Noellは24歳，母Lady Alice de Montfortは25歳であった。1177年以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1206年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Noell(이)가 1151년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Noell(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice de Montfort(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1177년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1206년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Noell nasceu em 1151, seu pai, Robert Noell, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Montfort, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Strange antes 1177, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1206, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Noell родился в 1151 г., его отцу по имени Robert Noell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Montfort, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Strange перед 1177 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер около 1206 г. в возрасте 56 лет.
